response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multi-language backend work, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — directly matching the role's stack and AI requirements. Demonstrates engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture experience across web, mobile, and embedded domains. Main gaps are explicit Nest.js experience and a recent career gap, but the core competencies align well with a mid-senior IC role.
strengths: Direct match on primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, plus AI-agent/MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq
13+ years across full-stack, microservices, and high-throughput systems; polyglot (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, code katas, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Current career gap (caregiving) since October 2025 — recency of hands-on work
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may dilute depth in the primary TS/Node stack expected here

key_factors.factor: Breadth and seniority of full-stack experience
